recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: Three lighthouse keepers on an uninhabited island off the coast of Scotland discover something that isn't theirs to keep.

recommendations.title: The Damned
recommendations.overview: A 19th-century widow has to make an impossible choice when, during an especially cruel winter, a foreign ship sinks off the coast of her Icelandic fishing village.

recommendations.title: La Pointe Courte
recommendations.overview: A penetrating study of a marriage on the rocks, set against the backdrop of a small Mediterranean fishing village. Both a stylized depiction of the complicated relationship between a married couple and a documentary-like look at the daily struggles o

recommendations.title: 1898: Our Last Men in the Philippines
recommendations.overview: The Philippines, 1898. Fifty Spanish soldiers arrive in the small village of Baler to rebuild an outpost. Although the war against the Filipinos and their American allies is almost lost, as is the Spanish Empire, the garrison will endure a cruel sieg

recommendations.title: The Backwoods
recommendations.overview: An English couple's holiday in Spain is interrupted when they discover a girl imprisoned in a cabin.

recommendations.title: Trouble at Timpetill
recommendations.overview: The children of a small European mountain village end up being its only residents, soon after the adults cannot take their behavior any longer.

recommendations.title: Come Out and Play
recommendations.overview: A couple take a vacation to a remote island - their last holiday together before they become parents. Soon after their arrival, they notice that no adults seem to be present - an observation that quickly presents a nightmarish reality.

recommendations.title: Aftershock
recommendations.overview: Mayhem and death follow when an earthquake traps a group of tourists in a Chilean town.

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

recommendations.title: The Super
recommendations.overview: A man becomes the superintendent of a large New York City apartment building where people mysteriously go missing.
